meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Speed Up Development for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Master AI-driven debugging to eliminate bottlenecks. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients as a freelancer.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development cycles, transition from manual logging to AI-assisted root cause analysis. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for iterative CLI debugging, you shift the bottleneck from your brain to the machine, reducing debugging time by up to 70% per ticket.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is impatient, and you are staring at a cryptic stack trace that defies logic. You know the code works in theory, but the integration layer is failing—again. Manual debugging is the silent killer of your hourly rate, turning high-leverage development into a tedious scavenger hunt through logs.

But the era of manual tracing is over. By treating your codebase as a data structure for AI to parse, you can move from 'guessing the bug' to 'automating the fix.' This tutorial bridges the gap between frustration and flow, showing you how to deploy elite-level AI debugging workflows that keep your delivery velocity high and your client satisfaction higher.

steps.title: Contextualizing the Bug with Antigravity
steps.description: Before fixing, you must map the failure. Use Antigravity to generate an architectural dependency graph of the problematic module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file structure and identify the dependency chain leading to the error in [module_name]. Generate a visual map of the state flow.

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs into Claude Code to identify the exact line of failure without manually stepping through execution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this error log: [paste_log]. Correlate these stack trace frames with the code logic in [file_path]. Suggest the most likely culprit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Analyze this error log and map it to the code: [paste_log]"

steps.title: Isolated Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Prevent regression by forcing the AI to write a failing test case that reproduces the bug before you apply the fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Jest/Pytest unit test that reproduces the bug identified in the previous step. Ensure it covers the edge case failing in production.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write "Generate a reproduction test case for this bug: [bug_description]"

steps.title: AI-Driven Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix using an iterative approach. Never let the AI rewrite the entire file; focus on surgical injections.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a surgical fix for [function_name] that maintains current state management but resolves the null-pointer exception identified.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit [file_path] --instruction "Apply the surgical fix for the identified null-pointer exception"

steps.title: Verification and Cleanup
steps.description: Run the tests and confirm the fix. Use Claude Code to verify that no side effects were introduced in downstream services.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the applied fix and perform a dependency impact analysis to ensure no breaking changes were introduced in [related_module].
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Verify the fix against all existing tests and check for regression in related modules"

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with the 'golden path' of your data flow; it reduces hallucinations by 40%.
Use Claude Code's --plan flag to force the AI to outline its logic before touching a single line of code.
When debugging, append your environment's version constraints (Node, Python, lib versions) to the prompt to avoid obsolete syntax suggestions.
Treat your AI debugging history as a 'knowledge base'—save successful fix prompts to a local markdown file for future client projects.
If the AI gets stuck, ask it to 'explain the state of the variables at line X'—this forces it to perform a mental trace.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI workflows into your CI/CD pipeline to move from reactive debugging to proactive error prevention.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on manual debugging and start delivering production-ready code in half the time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
